Class Book

java.lang.Object
com.library.model.Book
public class Book extends Object
Represents a book entity in the Library Management System.

Maps to the books table in the database: 

  id (PK) | title | author_id (FK) | genre | isbn | pub_year | copies

Each book belongs to exactly one Author. The field authorName is a denormalized JOIN value — it is populated by DAO queries and is not persisted directly.

Deletion of a book is restricted by the database if any active Loan records reference it.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private int
    authorId
    Foreign key referencing authors.id (NOT NULL in DB).
    private String
    authorName
    Denormalized author name populated via JOIN in DAO queries.
    private int
    copies
    Number of physical copies available.
    private String
    genre
    Genre of the book; nullable.
    private int
    id
    Primary key.
    private String
    isbn
    ISBN code; nullable, unique in the DB.
    private int
    pubYear
    Publication year; 0 is used as a sentinel for "not set" (stored as NULL in the database).
    private String
    title
    Title of the book (NOT NULL in DB).

    Full constructor used by BookDaoImpl when mapping a ResultSet.

  • Field Details

    • id

      private int id
      Primary key. Set by the database on INSERT.

    • title

      private String title
      Title of the book (NOT NULL in DB).

    • authorId

      private int authorId
      Foreign key referencing authors.id (NOT NULL in DB).

    • authorName

      private String authorName
      Denormalized author name populated via JOIN in DAO queries. Not stored in the books table; used only for display.

    • genre

      private String genre
      Genre of the book; nullable.

    • isbn

      private String isbn
      ISBN code; nullable, unique in the DB.

    • pubYear

      private int pubYear
      Publication year; 0 is used as a sentinel for "not set" (stored as NULL in the database).

    • copies

      private int copies
      Number of physical copies available. Must be >= 0 (enforced by DB CHECK constraint).

  • Constructor Details

    • Book

      public Book()
      No-arg constructor required for DAO result mapping.

    • Book

      public Book(int id, String title, int authorId, String authorName, String genre, String isbn, Integer pubYear, int copies)
      Full constructor used by BookDaoImpl when mapping a ResultSet.
      Parameters:
      id - primary key
      title - book title
      authorId - FK to the author
      authorName - denormalized author name from JOIN
      genre - genre (may be null)
      isbn - ISBN (may be null)
      pubYear - publication year, or 0 if unknown
      copies - number of available copies

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns:
      primary key of this book

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns:
      title of this book

    • getAuthorId

      public int getAuthorId()
      Returns:
      FK to the authors table

    • getAuthorName

      public String getAuthorName()
      Returns:
      denormalized author name (populated by JOIN, not stored)

    • getGenre

      public String getGenre()
      Returns:
      genre string, or null

    • getIsbn

      public String getIsbn()
      Returns:
      ISBN string, or null

    • getPubYear

      public int getPubYear()
      Returns:
      publication year, or 0 if not set

    • getCopies

      public int getCopies()
      Returns:
      number of physical copies available (>= 0)

    • setId

      public void setId(int id)
      Parameters:
      id - primary key (assigned after INSERT)

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Parameters:
      title - book title (must not be blank)

    • setAuthorId

      public void setAuthorId(int authorId)
      Parameters:
      authorId - FK to the author (must reference an existing author)

    • setAuthorName

      public void setAuthorName(String authorName)
      Parameters:
      authorName - denormalized name used for display

    • setGenre

      public void setGenre(String genre)
      Parameters:
      genre - genre string; null is allowed

    • setIsbn

      public void setIsbn(String isbn)
      Parameters:
      isbn - ISBN string; null is allowed

    • setPubYear

      public void setPubYear(int pubYear)
      Parameters:
      pubYear - publication year; pass 0 to store NULL in the database

    • setCopies

      public void setCopies(int copies)
      Parameters:
      copies - number of copies (>= 0); the DB enforces copies >= 0

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Two books are equal if and only if their id values match. This is used by JavaFX ComboBox to correctly pre-select items in edit dialogs.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a human-readable string used by JavaFX ComboBox via StringConverter.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      "Title (Author Name)"
